    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "import pandas as pd\n",
        "import matplotlib.pyplot as plt"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "id": "zEVk9SGaOGAG"
      },
      "execution_count": null,
      "outputs": []
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "import pandas as pd\n",
        "\n",
        "data = {\n",
        "\"Date\": [\"2024-01-01\",\"2024-01-02\",\"2024-01-03\",\"2024-01-04\",\"2024-01-05\"],\n",
        "\"Temperature\": [22, 24, 19, 23, 25],\n",
        "\"Rainfall\": [0, 5, 10, 2, 0]\n",
        "}\n",
        "\n",
        "df = pd.DataFrame(data)\n",
        "print(df)"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/"
        },
        "id": "c67aEUPyPRNJ",
        "outputId": "f901fb78-0aef-46e6-c3e0-8a6218a69f74"
      },
      "execution_count": null,
      "outputs": [
        {
          "output_type": "stream",
          "name": "stdout",
          "text": [
            "         Date  Temperature  Rainfall\n",
            "0  2024-01-01           22         0\n",
            "1  2024-01-02           24         5\n",
            "2  2024-01-03           19        10\n",
            "3  2024-01-04           23         2\n",
            "4  2024-01-05           25         0\n"
          ]
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "import matplotlib.pyplot as plt\n",
        "\n",
        "plt.plot(df[\"Date\"], df[\"Temperature\"])\n",
        "plt.title(\"Temperature Over Time\")\n",
        "plt.xlabel(\"Date\")\n",
        "plt.ylabel(\"Temperature\")\n",
        "plt.show()"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/",
          "height": 472
        },
        "id": "XV5YyT5bPZ4q",
        "outputId": "5270c9c4-a124-4df7-98e4-f45b2ad41a72"
      },
      "execution_count": null,
      "outputs": [
        {
          "output_type": "display_data",
          "data": {
            "text/plain": [
              "<Figure size 640x480 with 1 Axes>"
            ],
            "image/png": "\n"
          },
          "metadata": {}
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "max_temp = df[\"Temperature\"].max()\n",
        "hottest_day = df[df[\"Temperature\"] == max_temp]\n",
        "\n",
        "print(\"Hottest temperature:\", max_temp)\n",
        "print(hottest_day)"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/"
        },
        "id": "R7dD9YEZPe4K",
        "outputId": "767206b6-d6ca-411e-cdae-d344f1dc41e1"
      },
      "execution_count": null,
      "outputs": [
        {
          "output_type": "stream",
          "name": "stdout",
          "text": [
            "Hottest temperature: 25\n",
            "         Date  Temperature  Rainfall\n",
            "4  2024-01-05           25         0\n"
          ]
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "plt.plot(df[\"Date\"], df[\"Temperature\"], label=\"Temperature\")\n",
        "plt.plot(df[\"Date\"], df[\"Rainfall\"], label=\"Rainfall\")\n",
        "\n",
        "plt.title(\"Weather Analysis\")\n",
        "plt.xlabel(\"Date\")\n",
        "plt.legend()\n",
        "plt.show()"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/",
          "height": 472
        },
        "id": "jhl5e3jtPmz8",

          "metadata": {}
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "min_temp = df[\"Temperature\"].min()\n",
        "coldest_day = df[df[\"Temperature\"] == min_temp]\n",
        "\n",
        "print(\"Coldest temperature:\", min_temp)\n",
        "print(coldest_day)"
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "colab": {
          "base_uri": "https://localhost:8080/"
        },
        "id": "SFYzgu0bPvkv",

      },

          ]
        }
      ]
    },
    {
      "cell_type": "code",
      "source": [
        "avg_temp = df[\"Temperature\"].mean()\n",
        "print(\"Average temperature:\", avg_temp)"
      ],
